---
name: Crown Store report
about: Report an unsafe, private, infringing, or abusive Crown Store profile
title: "[Crown Store Report]: "
labels: crown-store, moderation
---

Thanks for helping keep the Crown Store tidy.

Use this report for profiles that may contain private data, tokens, passwords,
pairing identity, copyrighted media, abusive content, malware-like behavior, or
anything that should not be distributed publicly.

The app may prefill the profile name and source below.
